systems.name: MPP Orchestrator
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/mpp.py defines class MPPOrchestrator with 14 pipeline phases (-1 through 7.5). Imports and instantiates all 6 engines plus StateManager. Methods: phase_neg1_enforcement, phase_neg1b_environment, phase_0_claims, phase_05_mastery, phase_1_see, phase_2_mmd, phase_25_toolbox, phase_275_preparation, phase_6_verify, phase_7_receipt, phase_75_assimilation, fail_closed.

systems.name: Mastery Engine
inputs: knowledge_gaps (list of {gap_id, description, see_query, status, answer?})
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/mastery_engine.py defines class MasteryEngine. Creates MASTERY_DEFINITION artifacts conforming to MASTERY_DEFINITION.schema.json. Validates required fields, length constraints, and structural requirements. Stores definitions in StateManager for cross-session reuse. Phase 0.5 of MPP.

systems.name: SEE Engine (Search for Evidence)
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/see_engine.py defines class SEEEngine. Implements 6 evidence-gathering methods: LOCAL_FS, SCHEMA_VALIDATION, PRIOR_ARTIFACTS, HASH_VERIFICATION, CROSS_REFERENCE, and WEB_SEARCH. Uses QUALITY_RANKS (Q1-Q6) and METHOD_PRIORITY tables for 9 claim types. Assigns evidence strength: CONFIRMED, SUPPORTED, PARTIAL, CONTESTED, UNSUPPORTED, UNFALSIFIABLE. Phase 1 of MPP.

systems.name: MMD Engine (Missing Middle Detector)
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/mmd_engine.py defines class MMDEngine. Runs 6 detection methods: SCHEMA_COVERAGE, POLICY_COVERAGE, MASTERY_READINESS, DECISION_COMPLETENESS, EVIDENCE_GAPS, STATE_INTEGRITY. Produces findings with severity levels CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO. FAIL CLOSED on CRITICAL findings. Phase 2 of MPP.

systems.name: Decision Engine (Constraint-Driven)
outputs: decision_record with selected candidate, rejections, rationale, failure_modes
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/decision_engine.py defines class DecisionEngine. Replaces keyword-based pattern matching with constraint-driven elimination. 5-step pipeline: extract_constraints -> enumerate_candidates -> eliminate (hard constraints) -> score_candidates (soft constraints) -> select best. Requires minimum 2 candidates. Stores records in state for cross-session learning.

systems.name: RRP Engine (Recursive Refinement Protocol)
outputs: defect list with severity and category
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/rrp_engine.py defines class RRPEngine. Implements BUILD -> EVALUATE -> REWRITE cycle. MAX_ITERATIONS = 2 with convergence test (defects must decrease). Detects defects: SCHEMA_VIOLATION, CDR_VIOLATION, MISSING_FIELD. Plans rewrites by severity order. Phases 4-5 of MPP.

systems.name: Assimilation Engine
outputs: lessons extracted from MMD findings, RRP defects, mastery deltas
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/engines/assimilation_engine.py defines class AssimilationEngine. Promotion lifecycle: OBSERVATION -> HYPOTHESIS -> CONSTRAINT -> INVARIANT, each requiring evidence. Auto-promotes observations seen in 3+ sessions to HYPOTHESIS. Extracts lessons from MMD findings, RRP defects, and mastery comparison deltas. Phase 7.5 of MPP.

systems.name: State Manager (Cross-Session Persistence)
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/state/state_manager.py defines class StateManager. Manages state keys: version, sessions_count, mastery_definitions, decision_records, lesson_promotions, source_ledger_accumulated, pattern_catalog_version, query_patterns, source_reputation, known_defects, intelligence_level. Intelligence computed as: mastery_defs*3 + decision_records*2 + lessons*1 + constraints*5 + invariants*10.

systems.name: Pattern Catalog
outputs: 8 architectural patterns: BIJECTION, IDEMPOTENT, MONOTONIC, FAIL_CLOSED, CONSTRAINT_ELIMINATION, RECURSIVE_REFINEMENT, EVIDENCE_BEFORE_EXECUTION, LESSON_PROMOTION
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/patterns/MB_PATTERN_CATALOG.json v2.0 defines 8 patterns. Each has: pattern_id, name, description, when_to_use, strengths, weaknesses, required_capabilities, forbidden_when, exemplar, claim_strength. Used by DecisionEngine for constraint-driven elimination.

systems.name: Boot System
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/boot.py defines boot sequence: find_os_root (3 candidate paths), load_state (cross-session persistence), validate_os_tree (9 required dirs, 12 required files), run validation gates, emit_boot_receipt, print intelligence summary, initialize MPPOrchestrator.

systems.name: Validation Gates (MetaBlooms_OS)
outputs: Combined gate result: {overall: PASS|FAIL, gates: {name: {pass, ...}}, validated_utc}
systems.evidence: MetaBlooms_OS/validators/gates.py defines class ValidationGates with 5 gates: schema_existence (5 required schemas), policy_existence (5 required policy prefixes), json_validity (all JSON in artifacts/schemas/receipts), state_integrity (MB_STATE.json structure), pattern_catalog (exists and has patterns). Used by boot.py.

systems.name: Master Governance Gate
outputs: EXIT 0 (all pass) or EXIT 1 (one or more failed)
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_governance_gate.py orchestrates 10 gates in sequence: SCHEMA_VALIDATION, STALENESS, LFS_GAP, FORBIDDEN_LANGUAGE, INVARIANT, MATURITY, POLICY_STRUCTURE, TOOLBOX_REALITY, MMD, PREPARATION. Each gate runs as subprocess with 60s timeout. Used as pre-commit hook via install_hooks.sh.

systems.name: Schema Validation Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_schema_validation_gate.py validates BUNDLE_CATALOG entries against BUNDLE_ENTRY.schema.json, BUNDLE_LINEAGE against its schema, MMD_REPORT against its schema, BOOT_RECEIPT structural checks, INVARIANT_REGISTRY structural checks, and all JSON files parse cleanly. Requires jsonschema package.

systems.name: Staleness Detection Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_staleness_gate.py checks: BOOT_RECEIPT SHA-256 matches actual BOOT.md hash, BUNDLE_CATALOG covers every file in os_bundles/ (no uncataloged files, no phantom entries), policy_documents and schemas references in BOOT_RECEIPT point to existing files.

systems.name: LFS Gap Detection Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_lfs_gap_gate.py parses .gitattributes for filter=lfs patterns, then checks every file in os_bundles/ is covered by at least one LFS glob pattern. Groups untracked files by extension for clear reporting.

systems.name: Forbidden Language Detection Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_forbidden_language_gate.py scans agent-emitted artifacts for 8 forbidden words: enforced, verified, running, active, wired, booted, compliant, guaranteed. Exempts: human-authored governance docs, bundle filenames, JSON filename field values. Uses word-boundary regex matching.

systems.name: Invariant Evaluation Gate
inputs: Various policy docs, schemas, and validators
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_invariant_gate.py evaluates 6 ACTIVE invariants with mechanical checkers: MB_INV_NLQ_REQUIRED_V1 (MBQL+INTENT_IR), MB_INV_BUNDLE_INTERNALS_AS_EVIDENCE_V1 (SEE+LEARNING_EVENT), MB_INV_MATURITY_PIPELINE_V1 (maturity tracker+gate+policy), MB_INV_CLAIM_STRENGTH_REQUIRED_V1 (claim strength policy+Wikipedia), MB_INV_TOOLBOX_REALITY_R25_V1 (schema+gate+super-prompt), MB_INV_WIKIPEDIA_PROHIBITION_V1 (policy doc check).

systems.name: Artifact Maturity Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_maturity_gate.py verifies artifact maturity claims are mechanically provable. DRAFT: file exists. VALIDATED: file exists + schema or structural check. ENFORCED: VALIDATED + validator exists + gate registered. Also detects untracked artifacts and validates summary counts.

systems.name: Policy Structure Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_policy_structure_gate.py validates structural integrity of 9 policy documents: SUPER_PROMPT (MPP phases, forbidden language, BOOT ref), CDR (7 pillars, violation classes), SEE (evidence sources, quality ranks, strength levels, BUNDLE_INTERNAL_EVENTS), RRP (BUILD/EVALUATE/REWRITE, convergence bounds), DELTAGATE (PROPOSE/ADMIT/REJECT), LIFECYCLE (6 statuses), LEARNING_PIPELINE (RCA/EVT_FAIL/EVT_LEARNING/corrective), MBQL (NLQ/FROM/WHERE/SELECT/INTENT_IR/INVARIANT), MATURITY (DRAFT/VALIDATED/ENFORCED, demotion rules).

systems.name: Toolbox Reality Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_toolbox_reality_gate.py enforces R2.5: schema exists with title ToolboxReality, environment declaration has filesystem_write, and at least one policy doc references TOOLBOX_REALITY or R2.5. FAIL-CLOSED on missing schema.

systems.name: MMD Gate (Mechanical Gap Detector)
inputs: All .codex/ JSON artifacts and markdown policies
outputs: EXIT 0 (pass or pass_with_warnings) or EXIT 18 (CRITICAL fail)
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_mmd_gate.py runs 6 detection methods: REFERENCE_GRAPH (broken file references), SCHEMA_COVERAGE (unschema'd artifacts), TRACEABILITY (validators registered, invariants have checkers, schemas referenced), DEFERRAL_AUDIT (unexplained deferrals in delta ledgers), SELF_CHECK (MMD report validates against own schema), CATEGORY_COMPLETENESS (closed enum detection). Inspired by DO-178C traceability.

systems.name: Preparation Gate
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/run_preparation_gate.py enforces Phase 2.75 readiness: master spec exists and contains all 6 phases (SURFACE, DETECT, PREPARE, REFUSE, EXECUTE, ASSIMILATE), 3 core schemas exist and are valid JSON with title or $schema. Blocks BUILD without preparation.

systems.name: Upload Pipeline (mb-upload.sh)
outputs: Git push with retry (max 4 attempts, exponential backoff)
systems.evidence: scripts/mb-upload.sh v2.0-governed. Termux-based Android uploader. Patterns: IDEMPOTENT (skips existing files), FAIL_CLOSED (unknown extensions rejected), MONOTONIC (append-only). Parses .gitattributes dynamically for LFS patterns. Preflight checks: storage access, repo clone, git, git-lfs. Exponential backoff push retry (2s/4s/8s/16s).

systems.name: Git Hook Installer
systems.evidence: .codex/validators/install_hooks.sh installs a pre-commit hook that runs python3 .codex/validators/run_governance_gate.py. Prompts before overwriting existing hook. Blocks commits when governance gates fail.

systems.name: JSON Schema System
outputs: Validation pass/fail per entry against schema
systems.evidence: 13 JSON schemas across MetaBlooms_OS/schemas/ and .codex/schemas/ define the structural contracts for all artifact types: MASTERY_DEFINITION, DECISION_RECORD, LESSON_PROMOTION, TURN_RECEIPT, MMD_REPORT, BUNDLE_ENTRY, BUNDLE_LINEAGE, INTENT_IR, LEARNING_EVENT, TOOLBOX_REALITY, ROBUSTNESS_METRICS, SCENARIO_SET, DELTA_LEDGER.
